---
title: ""
---

::: {.hero}

# Alejandra Martínez

Assistant Professor
Department of Basic Sciences
National University of Luján

Researcher at CONICET

Argentina

:::

My research focuses on **robust statistics**, **semiparametric models** and **variable selection**.

Welcome to my academic website. Here you will find information about my research, teaching, software, and freely available educational resources.

::: {.social-links}
<a class="social-button" href="https://github.com/alemermartinez" target="_blank">
GitHub
</a>

<a class="social-button" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1893-2039" target="_blank">
ORCID
</a>

<a class="social-button" href="mailto:ammartinez@conicet.gov.ar">
Email
</a>
:::
